page.title: Project planning

empty.title: No planning phases yet
empty.description: Create SAP Activate phases or generate the complete plan (phases, activities, and tasks) once the project has start and end dates defined.

editor.title: Phase editor

editor.saveAllHelp: persists all phases and updates project dates.

save.successWithProjectDates: Planning saved and project dates updated.
save.error: Error saving planning. Please try again.

gantt.title: SAP Activate phases
gantt.subtitle: Executive view of phases and durations, aligned with the date editor.
gantt.empty: Set start and end dates in the phase editor to view the timeline.

timeline.empty: Set start and end dates in the phase editor to view the timeline.

errors.createPhases: Could not create phases. Verify your permissions or try again later.
errors.generatePhases: An error occurred while generating phases. Please try again.
